description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a rooftop terrace featuring a swimming pool, lounge area, and shaded seating. The exterior is predominantly white with large, grid-style windows on the main facade, allowing for ample natural light. The house is surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped garden with several trees and a patio area equipped with outdoor furniture and an umbrella. Balconies with glass railings are visible on the upper floors, adding to the contemporary aesthetic. The rear and side facades are more minimal, with fewer windows and clean, geometric lines. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces, modern materials, and a sleek, urban appearance.
description: A modern, multi-story house with a flat roof, rooftop pool, large grid windows, balconies, and a landscaped garden with outdoor seating.
description_view_0: The rear view shows a mostly solid white wall with minimal windows, the rooftop pool, and part of the garden with trees and a shaded seating area.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the main facade with large grid windows, the main entry area, garden, and patio with umbrella and trees.
description_view_2: The side view displays asymmetrical window placement, balconies with glass railings, and a partial view of the garden and rooftop amenities.
description_view_3: The opposite rear/side view shows a flat white wall with several windows, the rooftop pool, and a strip of green lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large grid windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a large glass door, minimal steps, and is integrated with a landscaped patio and umbrella seating area.
